verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I have a source of strength when I am weak, That takes me through when life is pressing me. I have a source of power from above, I'm covered over by a shield of love.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I claim the blood Jesus shed on Calvary, Those precious blood stains were made there just for me. For all my sins, my sickness and my pain, When I need healing, I claim those precious blood stains.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I do not know how others make it through, Who never go to Calvary as I do. For there's a healing, cleansing stream which flows, With peace that only His redeemed can know.
